attribution: Algorithm structure and movable-cycle taxonomy derived from orthocal-python (Brian Glass, MIT-licensed). The implementation in src/lib/calendar/ is a clean-room TypeScript reimplementation of the Gauss Paschalion algorithm and a Theosis-authored editorial Menaion. The orthocal.info site content is separately licensed CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 and is not used here.
usage: Conceptual reference for the 'pdist' (paschal-day offset) abstraction.
Cross-validation of named movable-cycle days against orthocal-python's day.py and year.py.
Future port target: lectionary tables (Phase A.2) and fasting-rule logic (Phase F).
notReused: orthocal.info site content (CC BY-NC-SA — incompatible with commercial App Store distribution).
John Brady abbamoses.com saint biographies (cited as orthocal.info content source 'by permission').
